Looking at the remaining projects, **Tests.csproj** needs xunit 2.9.3 and System.Text.Json 10.0.1. Now I need to consolidate all these into a central package management setup by creating a Directory.Packages.props file with the highest versions of each package, then removing version attributes from all the individual project files. For packages with conditional requirements across different target frameworks, I'll need to use VersionOverride in the project files since the central props can only specify one version per package. I should also enable ManagePackageVersionsCentrally and clean up the MSBuild version properties that are currently scattered across Directory.Build.props. Setting the central version to 8.0.11 and using VersionOverride="6.0.36" on the net6.0 conditional reference to handle the version difference between target frameworks.

Now I'm compiling all the packages and their versions to determine the highest version for each one in the central package management file.
